text.title: tailwind Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tailwind as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats JIT, creates an extra class with no benefit over using text-2xl directly.

failure-mode.description: Constructing class names with template literals: bg-${color}-500
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: JIT purges classes not present as complete strings in source files. Works in dev, silently broken in prod.

failure-mode.description: style={{ width: 100 }} or style={{ marginTop: 13 }} for one-off values
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixes two styling layers; bypasses the design system; not picked up by theme changes.

failure-mode.description: Recurring arbitrary values: w-[37.5px] appearing in multiple components
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bypasses the design system; creates undocumented one-off measurements that diverge over time.

failure-mode.description: Extracting utility groups to @apply "for cleanliness": .card { @apply rounded-lg border p-6; }
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Increases CSS bundle, defeats JIT tree-shaking, recreates the class-naming problem Tailwind eliminates.

failure-mode.description: Using important: true in tailwind.config.ts to fix specificity conflicts with third-party CSS
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wins the specificity war but makes the maintenance battle unwinnable. Refactor the source of conflict or use prefix: 'tw-' instead.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated utilities: text-3.5xl, bg-primary-500/0.6 (wrong opacity syntax)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tailwind opacity syntax is bg-primary-500/60 (integer) or bg-primary-500/[0.6] (arbitrary). Build with --strict to fail-fast on unknown classes.

failure-mode.description: Missing group or peer class on parent when using group-hover: or peer-hover:
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without the group/peer class on the parent, the variant silently has no effect.

failure-mode.description: Forgetting dark: variants when not using semantic tokens
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Component looks correct in light mode, broken in dark mode. Pair every color with dark: or switch to semantic variable tokens.
